notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the bind9.16 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 3 CVEs: CVE-2024-1737, CVE-2024-1975, CVE-2024-4076.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
